agent.name: PM Agent
agent.description: Generates the final project summary and delivery report from the compiled documentation and pipeline run metadata. Closes the pipeline with a PM-level overview, sprint metrics, and next-step recommendations.

input.description: Compiled documentation package plus pipeline run metadata, sprint data, and milestone data

required_fields.description: ID of the compiled_documents document produced by Documentation Agent
ID of the pipeline run being summarised
Pipeline run summary: started_at, completed_at, total steps, failed steps, retry count per step
Content of the approved Requirement Summary (key inputs for executive summary)
Content of the approved Gap Analysis Report (open questions and gaps)

optional_fields.description: Current sprint records for this project (sprint_number, name, status, story_points_total, story_points_done)
Current milestone records (name, target_date, actual_date, status)
Unresolved open questions (OQ-XXX) from Gap Analysis — included in risk register

constraints: compiled_document_id must reference a document with status = draft or approved
Combined input must not exceed 32,000 characters per LLM call
Agent must not modify or contradict content in the compiled_documents — refer to it, do not rewrite it

output.description: Two final delivery documents: a concise executive project summary and a detailed delivery report

sections.description: 2–3 paragraph summary of what was built, key decisions, and business value
Table of all FRs and NFRs with delivery status (delivered / deferred / out-of-scope)
Table of all documents produced in this pipeline run with document type, version, and status
Sprint table: sprint number, name, planned dates, status, story points done/total
Milestone table: MVP name, target date, actual date, status
Table of unresolved open questions (OQ-XXX) with priority and owner
Recommended next actions in priority order
Project name, pipeline run ID, dates, total duration, agent runs
Table of all pipeline steps: step name, agent, started_at, completed_at, duration, retries, status
Full list of all documents produced: type, version, status, approved_by, approved_at
FR coverage %, test case count per FR, traceability link count, re-run count
Risks derived from open questions (OQ-XXX) and any rejected steps — with likelihood, impact, mitigation
Sign-off table with roles (PM, BA, Architect, QA) — filled by humans after delivery

responsibilities: Produce a concise project_summary suitable for stakeholder / executive review
Produce a detailed delivery_report for the project team including pipeline execution metrics
Reference FR-XXX, NFR-XXX, and OQ-XXX IDs from source documents
Calculate quality metrics from pipeline_run_metadata (step durations, retry counts)
List all unresolved open questions with their risk impact
Do NOT make promises about future development — describe what was delivered only
If sprint or milestone data is absent, omit those sections rather than fabricating data

on_success.condition: Pipeline run is complete. Set pipeline_runs.status = completed.

on_failure.message: PM Agent failed to generate the project summary or delivery report. Check pipeline run metadata and compiled_document_id and retry.

office_behaviour.chat_bubble_on_handoff: Pipeline complete. Project summary and delivery report ready for review.
